guidance_revenue.label: Revenue guidance (implied)
guidance_revenue.note: For FY '27, management has given a guidance of 80 million tonnes, which is roughly a growth of 9% to 10% against an expected industry growth of 5%.

guidance_margin.label: EBITDA-margin guidance (implied)
guidance_margin.note: Management stated it would be a 'Herculean task' to give an estimate of EBITDA per tonne at this stage and that any guidance on EBITDA would be difficult.

mgmt_tone.label: Management tone confident & consistent
mgmt_tone.note: Management expresses confidence in achieving FY '27 volume guidance through internal execution and stabilizing acquired assets, despite anticipating softer demand and industry headwinds.

strategic_stocking.label: Strategic stocking vs channel-stuffing
strategic_stocking.value: Higher closing inventory due to higher clinker production vs sales volumes; good level of inventory for raw materials and inputs.
strategic_stocking.note: Management noted higher closing inventory due to higher clinker production versus sales volumes, with the benefit of this surplus expected to flow in the coming period, and also mentioned carrying a good amount of inventory for raw materials and inputs.

market_share.label: Market share stable/gaining
market_share.value: Market share gain, especially in Q3 FY '26; good headroom to improve market share.
market_share.note: Management stated they delivered industry-leading performance in Q3 FY '26, growing volumes at 2x the industry average, and that actions on premiumization and mix improvement helped capture significantly higher market share, reinforcing their leadership position.

demand_anticipation.label: Forward demand (1 strong – 5 weak)
demand_anticipation.value: Softer demand expected for FY '27; April and May demand looks a little subdued and soft.
demand_anticipation.note: Management anticipates softer demand for FY '27, with April and May looking 'a little subdued and soft', and expects industry growth to be around 5%.

guidance_margin.label: EBITDA-margin guidance (implied)
guidance_margin.note: Management stated, "Combined ratio guidance, I already said that we are aspiring to have a combined ratio 3% lower than 116, which would be around 113 maybe for this year." and "For a near future, we would target 110 as our combined ratio which is where we would feel it is possible and achievable."

strategic_stocking.note: There is no mention of strategic stocking, channel-stuffing, or slow-moving inventory in the provided excerpts.

market_share.label: Market share stable/gaining
market_share.note: The company's market share increased from 12.56% to 12.74% during FY26, was approximately 13.40% in Q3 FY26, increased to 15.51% from 14.65% in Q1 FY26, and was 12.6% for FY25, indicating a stable or gaining trend.

demand_anticipation.label: Forward demand (1 strong – 5 weak)
demand_anticipation.note: Management notes promising macroeconomic and social trends contributing to gradual yet steady improvement in insurance penetration, and expects growth in the reinsurance-driven fire segment to continue.

guidance_revenue.label: Revenue guidance (implied)
guidance_revenue.value: FY25-30 CAGR: Edible Oils 7.7%, Rice 10.8%, Pulses 5.9%, Wheat Flour 8%, Sugar 4.9%, Besan 5.9%, Poha 19.4%, Soya Chunks 12%. Vision 2030: Total Revenue ₹ 1 Lac+ Crore (2x current), Food Volume Share >25%, Food Revenues ~₹ 4,000 Crore.
guidance_revenue.note: Management provides CAGR for various categories from FY25-30 and a Vision 2030 target for total revenue, food volume share, and food revenues.

guidance_margin.label: EBITDA-margin guidance (implied)
guidance_margin.value: EBITDA per ton: INR3,500-INR4,000. Food business EBITDA margins: 5%-7%. Overall EBITDA: >20% by 2030.
guidance_margin.note: Management guides for a sustainable EBITDA per ton of INR3,500 to INR4,000, expects food business EBITDA margins between 5% to 7% in 2-3 years, and targets overall EBITDA >20% by 2030.

order_book.label: Order book growing
order_book.note: The provided excerpts do not contain information about an order book or order inflow.

mgmt_tone.note: Management consistently expresses confidence in achieving margin targets, market share gains, and future growth across multiple quarters, despite some challenging market conditions.

strategic_stocking.label: Strategic stocking vs channel-stuffing
strategic_stocking.value: Procure a significant amount of wheat during the harvest.
strategic_stocking.note: Management mentions procuring a significant amount of wheat during harvest, which is a standard practice rather than a deliberate strategic stocking ahead of demand or channel-stuffing.

market_share.label: Market share stable/gaining
market_share.value: Market leader in Soyabean Oil (27.2% MS), Mustard Oil (14.8% MS), and created and leads Snack Sauce (16.3% MS). Improving sequential market share in higher growth categories and Basmati rice. Over 50% market share in soybean oil in 4 big markets (Bihar, Delhi, Haryana, Punjab).
market_share.note: Management states it is a market leader in several categories and has seen improving sequential market share in higher growth and branded categories, including Basmati rice, and holds over 50% market share in soybean oil in key regions.

demand_anticipation.label: Forward demand (1 strong – 5 weak)
demand_anticipation.value: Demand environment remained moderately challenging, though offtake improved in the second half of Q3 FY'26. Strong demand in urban Tier 2 and Tier 3 towns, continuing till today. Expects a jump in consumption of snack foods, fried items, namkeens, and bakery products in H2.
demand_anticipation.note: Management indicates a moderately challenging demand environment with improving offtake, strong and continuing demand in Tier 2 and Tier 3 urban markets, and anticipates a jump in consumption for certain food categories in H2.

guidance_revenue.label: Revenue guidance (implied)
guidance_revenue.value: Double-digit CAGR over the next three years (through FY28)

guidance_margin.label: EBITDA-margin guidance (implied)
guidance_margin.value: EBITDA to be a bit soft in the next couple of quarters, then track up
guidance_margin.note: Management expects EBITDA to be a bit soft in the next couple of quarters due to additional costs from new leaders and listing compliance, but anticipates margins will track up as the business grows and these costs are absorbed.

order_book.label: Order book growing
order_book.value: Very strong and well diversified; 100% revenue coverage through FY 2028; double-digit CAGR visibility over the next three years; exports contributing over 20% of total order book.
order_book.note: The order book is described as very strong and well diversified, providing 100% revenue coverage through FY 2028 and supporting a clear double-digit CAGR visibility over the next three years, with exports now contributing over 20% of the total.
